com.nib.commons.io.FileIOResponse

Packages that use FileIOResponse
Package
Description
com.nib.commons.io
File I/O and Catalog API
com.nib.commons.io.vsam
VSAM emulation API for Oracle

  • Uses of FileIOResponse in com.nib.commons.io

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    FileIOResponse
    FileIOResponse.atEnd(FileIOResponse.ConditionDelegate lambda)
    Executes the delegate if the EOF condition has been raised
    FileIOResponse
    AbstractFile.close()
    Close the file
    FileIOResponse
    SequentialFile.close()
    Closes the file, releasing associated resources.
    FileIOResponse
    FileIOResponse.invalidKey(FileIOResponse.ConditionDelegate lambda)
    Executes the delegate if the invalid key condition has been raised
    FileIOResponse
    FileIOResponse.notAtEnd(FileIOResponse.ConditionDelegate lambda)
    Executes the delegate if the EOF condition has not been raised
    FileIOResponse
    FileIOResponse.notInvalidKey(FileIOResponse.ConditionDelegate lambda)
    Executes the delegate if the invalid key condition has not been raised
    FileIOResponse
    FileIOResponse.onFailure(FileIOResponse.ConditionDelegate lambda)
    Executes the delegate if operation was not successfull
    FileIOResponse
    FileIOResponse.onSuccess(FileIOResponse.ConditionDelegate lambda)
    Executes the delegate if operation was successfull
    FileIOResponse
    AbstractFile.open(OpenMode openMode)
    Open the fire with default lock mode (shared)
    FileIOResponse
    AbstractFile.open(OpenMode openMode, LockMode lockMode)
    Open the file
    FileIOResponse
    SequentialFile.open(OpenMode openMode)
    Opens the file in the specified open mode, delegating to the open(OpenMode, LockMode) method with a shared lock mode.
    FileIOResponse
    SequentialFile.open(OpenMode openMode, LockMode lockMode)
    Opens the file with the specified open mode and lock mode, initializing the I/O API accordingly.
    FileIOResponse
    AbstractFile.printLine(String format, Object... args)
    prints a formatted line on the field
    FileIOResponse
    SequentialFile.read()
    Reads the next record from the file without locking.
    FileIOResponse
    AbstractFile.readNext()
    Read next record
    abstract FileIOResponse
    AbstractFile.readNext(boolean lock)
    Read next record
    FileIOResponse
    AbstractFile.readNext(AbstractNField into)
    Reads the next record and moves the record content in the target field
    FileIOResponse
    DummyFile.readNext(boolean lock)
     
    FileIOResponse
    SequentialFile.readNext(boolean lock)
    Reads the next record from the file, optionally applying a lock.
    FileIOResponse

    Reads previous record
    abstract FileIOResponse

    Reads the previous record

    SequentialFile.readPrev(boolean lock)
    Reads the previous record from the file, optionally applying a lock.

    Writes the current record
    FileIOResponse

    Writes the record from the specified field for teh specified length
